---
title: "Michael Castaño"
name: "Michael Castaño"
image: "/images/profile_pics/michael_castano.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** Mechanisms of community structuring in tropical birds"
location: "**Research location:** Panama"
dates: "**Dates:** 2022-present"
category: "Current"
category_order: "2"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
